title: Should I buy 222 now or wait
display_title: Should I buy 222 now or wait
wikitext:
[]: Should I buy 2.22 now or wait?             Quote Post by duexmachina » Thu Jun 23, 2011 5:47 pm Should I wait a while until they release some new cover art, like they did for 1.11 with a nice outside cover and nice design inside? How long do you guys think the wait is going to be until they make something new for 2.22?

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Thu Jun 23, 2011 5:54 pm Just get it man. The only time FUNimation would redo the cover art for the Rebuild movies is if they're released in either a complete boxset or they go Viridian Collection/Anime Classics on it's ass, which isn't gonna happen anytime soon. My advice? Suck it up and get the DVD now while the gettings good. IT. IS. WORTH. IT.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Jun 23, 2011 6:20 pm Stop being a tard-bucket and buy it already.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Jun 23, 2011 8:53 pm Yeah, I don't think they're gonna re-do the cover anytime soon. They only did that for the first new Evangelion film because they technically released to separate cuts of the film: 1.01, and 1.11. Funi's already released the 2.22 cut, so they're done with that for now. I'm pretty sure there will be a Funi complete box-set edition whenever Khara releases the 3.33/maybe also 4.44/FINAL/who knows film(s).

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Jun 23, 2011 10:18 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: I'm pretty sure there will be a Funi complete box-set edition whenever Khara releases the 3.33/maybe also 4.44/FINAL/who knows film(s).

[]:             Quote Post by Lowki » Thu Jun 23, 2011 10:51 pm If you haven't got it yet just buy it, i can't believe your on this forum and you haven't bought it yet tbh! Either way your missing out at the moment, enough procrastination good sir.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Fri Jun 24, 2011 12:14 am Never. Unlike 1.01 and 1.11 which got seperate releases,2.22 is the full package with everything that 1.11 has like extra's and extra scenes. Just buy the damn dvd and suck it up.

[]:             Quote Post by Enzyme » Fri Jun 24, 2011 1:33 am Don't do it. You'll end up checking the forum every hour for news on the release of 3.0 like me... :)

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Fri Jun 24, 2011 1:41 am Enzyme wrote: Don't do it. You'll end up checking the forum every hour for news on the release of 3.0 like me... :)

[]:             Quote Post by Enzyme » Fri Jun 24, 2011 2:30 am Eva 04 wrote: That's called having a problem. I'm sure you have some sort of life outside the internet instead of checking some forum every hour for news on a movie.

[]:             Quote Post by Knuckles » Fri Jun 24, 2011 3:14 am I love how he asked a simple question, didn't even complain at all, and what he gets is 'suck it up' 'stop being a ____', etc. Very nice.

[]:             Quote Post by duexmachina » Fri Jun 24, 2011 3:19 am I was just wondering if they would release something new. I'll swing by and pick it up this weekend. Why does 2.22 look so plain and simple compared to the 1.11 DVD? 1.11 had those pictures of Shinji and Rei inside and a nice glossy cover.

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Fri Jun 24, 2011 3:38 am The best is to wait when the whole series finish. I am sure a grand deluxe package for all 4 movies will be released. You can tell I am biding my time for it

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Jun 24, 2011 8:22 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Yeah, but would you really want to be a lame-o and be the last one to the party?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jun 24, 2011 9:41 am For whatever it's worth, I was going to wait until some inevitable Japanese BD boxset to get all the films, but buying the Funimation 1.01/1.11/2.22 DVDs was too tempting that I couldn't help myself. I ended up giving the DVDs away (except for 1.01, dunno what to do with it) and buying the 2.22 BD even though I don't have a BD-player. Yes I'm weird. For Funimation's releases, you might as well buy now, but I think it's safe to say that Khara is going to release some 4-film boxset down the line. (Whether it would be both DVD or BD-release who knows.) Also, keep this thread in mind, if lack of Fly Me To The Moon bothers you: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=10999 and also: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=10991

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Fri Jun 24, 2011 11:06 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: I'm pretty sure there will be a Funi complete box-set edition whenever Khara releases the 3.33/maybe also 4.44/FINAL/who knows film(s).

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Fri Jun 24, 2011 11:54 am Eh, you can still use them as fuel or toilet paper.

[]: Re: Should I buy 2.22 now or wait?             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Mon Jun 27, 2011 5:15 pm duexmachina wrote: Should I wait a while until they release some new cover art, like they did for 1.11 with a nice outside cover and nice design inside? How long do you guys think the wait is going to be until they make something new for 2.22?

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Thu Jun 30, 2011 1:34 pm Buy it! it's the 2.22 release so they won't go back and touch it up like they did with 1.01 and 1.11, and Funimation put a lot of emphasis on the cover art during the previews so it is highly unlikely they will change it. And a final word buy it before they change the bonus items on the disc, like what happened to SSD and her 1.11.

[]:             Quote Post by DanYeomans » Thu Jun 30, 2011 3:31 pm I bought the Blu-Ray special edition, and it's probably one of the best purchases I've ever made. Aside from buying the platinum edition original run, of course :3
